topic: Classifying angles as acute, right, or obtuse
latex:
Fill in the blanks to complete a true statement about angle $BCD$ below.

[DIAGRAM]

Angle $BCD$ is \_\_\_\_\_\_ because it is \_\_\_\_\_\_ than a \_\_\_\_\_\_ angle.
answer_latex: Angle $BCD$ is \underline{acute} because it is \underline{smaller} than a $90^\circ$ angle.
